Who I Am

Structure Design Professional

I'm a Structural Engineer specializing in Steel and RCC structure design — delivering precise, innovative, and economical structural solutions across industrial, commercial, and residential projects.

With 9 industry-standard tools and real-world construction experience, I cover the full scope — from analysis and design to BOQ, detailing, and fabrication-ready drawings.

My work is built on three things: accuracy in every calculation, innovation in every approach, and timely delivery — every time.

Steel Structures
RCC Design

Industrial Platforms

B.E. Civil Engineering
Strong academic and practical foundation in structural engineering

Technical Skills

Software Expertise

📊
STAAD PRO
Structural analysis & code-based design of steel, RCC and composite structures
Analysis
🏢
ETABS
Multi-storey building analysis — lateral loads, seismic design, frame design
Analysis
🔫
Tekla Structure
BIM-based 3D steel modelling, detailing & fabrication drawing generation
Steel BIM
📐
AutoCAD
Precise 2D drafting — GA plans, erection & fabrication drawings
Drafting
🏗
Archicad
RCC structural BIM for residential & commercial projects
RCC BIM
🔗
IDEA Statica
Advanced steel connection design & verification per EC3 / IS standards
Connections
📦
Sketchup
Quick 3D conceptual modelling for spatial visualization
3D Model
✨
Enscape / Lumion
Photorealistic rendering & real-time walkthroughs for client approval
Rendering

MS Excel
Custom structural calculation sheets, BOQ & Bill of Material tracking

The Advantage

Why Work With Me?

🎯
Design-Focused Approach
Every structural solution is engineered to be safe, economical, and buildable — with design intent at the core.
⏰
On-Time Delivery
Construction timelines are real. My workflow is structured to hit every deadline without compromising quality.
✅
Accurate & Detailed Output
Every drawing and calculation is code-checked and ready for direct use on site — no rework, no surprises.
🤝
Flexible Freelance Support
Available for short-term and long-term projects. I adapt to your workflow, tools, and requirements.

Open to Long-Term & Short-Term Projects — Let's Build Something Great
